titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Cornell University Office of the Registrar miscellany, 1913-1968,
Cornell University Office of the Registrar miscellany, 1913-1968.
titlestmt.author: Compiled by T.A. Gobert

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

titlepage.titleproper: Guide to the Cornell University Office of the Registrar Miscellany,
titlepage.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell University Library

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu
http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.unittitle: Cornell University Office of the Registrar miscellany,

origination.label: Creator:
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Office of the Registrar.

did.physdesc: Correspondence, annual reports, and printed material.
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Collection includes a summary of both undergraduate and graduate annual degree awards from the first commencement in 1869 to 1966 and annual fall enrollment statistics (1868-1968) compiled by Registrar Herbert H. Williams; correspondence (1963-64) between Williams, Cornell President James A. Perkins, and Elwood Hunter of Josten's-E.A. Wright Company of Philadelphia, diploma suppliers, concerning planning and preparation of the new form of diploma, 1963-64, Williams' report (1963) to the Ad Hoc Diploma Revision Committee, and twelve sample diplomas; a letter and postcard from David F. Hoy, 1919; and annual reports of the registrar (1962-68).

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Collection includes a summary of both undergraduate and graduate annual degree awards from the first commencement in 1869 to 1966 and annual fall enrollment statistics (1868-1968) compiled by Registrar Herbert H. Williams; correspondence (1963-64) between Williams, Cornell President James A. Perkins, and Elwood Hunter of Josten's-E.A. Wright Company of Philadelphia, diploma suppliers, concerning planning and preparation of the new form of diploma, 1963-64, Williams' report (1963) to the Ad Hoc Diploma Revision Committee, and twelve sample diplomas; a letter and postcard from David F. Hoy, 1919; and annual reports of the registrar (1962-68).

controlaccess.head: Names:
controlaccess.corpname: Cornell University. Office of the Registrar.

did.unittitle: Correspondence regarding the selection of a new design for the Cornell diploma
Summary of annual degree awards, 1869 to present
Annual fall enrollment records, 1868 to present
Letter from Registrar David F. Hoy
Diploma and twelve samples of the new diploma adopted in Spring 1964 (oversized material)

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University Office of the Registrar miscellany, #36-1-876. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
